acceptance_checks.verify_method: bats: cli/tests/statusline.bats — a payload carrying context_window.used_percentage writes .eidolons/.context/meter.json with estimate_source=host and the correct zone (ECM rung-1 promotion)
bats: cli/tests/statusline.bats — render emits exactly 2 lines on stdout and exits 0
bats: cli/tests/statusline.bats — zone label follows the ECM §3.1 ladder at every boundary (green <50 <= amber <75 <= red <90 <= critical)
bats: cli/tests/statusline.bats — fail-open: empty stdin / malformed JSON / nulls / absent jq / no git repo all exit 0 with non-empty stdout (a dead statusline blanks the Claude Code bar)
bats: cli/tests/statusline.bats — NO_COLOR=1 emits zero ANSI escapes; colour IS emitted by default despite stdout being a pipe
bats: cli/tests/statusline.bats — render completes within the ECM CC3 <=300ms prompt-path budget
bats: cli/tests/statusline.bats — no bash 4+ constructs and no dynamic evaluation (no eval, no sourcing of payload/branch-derived data) in cli/src/statusline.sh
bats: cli/tests/statusline.bats — no emitted line exceeds $COLUMNS at widths 40..120; the gauge survives every degradation level
bats: cli/tests/statusline.bats — rate_limits.five_hour renders an MP gauge showing REMAINING; absent rate_limits renders no MP segment
bats: cli/tests/statusline.bats — delta popup (↑n/↓n) fires on the second render of a session when used_percentage moved; absent on the first render
bats: cli/tests/statusline.bats — zone-transition flash (reverse video) present on exactly the transition render, absent on the next same-zone render, suppressed entirely under NO_COLOR
bats: cli/tests/statusline.bats — quest fanfare renders COMPLETE exactly once when the tracked quest goes in_progress→verified, then decays
bats: cli/tests/statusline.bats — demo exits 0 with ≥5 HUD frames + wiring snippet; doctor exits 0 and leaves settings.json byte-identical
bats: cli/tests/statusline.bats — roster agent renders in its class colour (kupo=1;35m); model.id job title present at wide widths, dropped at the floor; exceeds_200k_tokens renders OVERFLOW
bats: cli/tests/statusline.bats — v1 invariants hold with v2 segments live: width 40..120, unwritable state dir stays fail-open 2-line, NO_COLOR zero ANSI
